view.viewstatment:
create or replace view issue_by_complaint_all_case as select i.id issue_id,i.issue_title,i.project_name,i.business_id,i.business_id_by_date ,cm.business_comp_id,cm.id as comp_id,cm.ticket_type,cm.current_owner,cm.current_owner_id,cm.current_owner_since,tp.type_name ,cu.sys_id as customer_id,cu.name as customer_name,cu.mobile as mobile,cu.age_group as age,u.user_id,u.user_name,u.full_name ,s.user_id as sender_id,s.full_name as sender_name ,IST.BEGIN_DATE as entry_date,dl.acknowledge_date,dl.option1 comp_subject,dl.resp_context as resp,dl.receip_id ,dl.is_acknowledged,dl.any_comment as comments,dl.client_com_id,dl.option3, p.project_id department_id,p.project_name department_name,p.option_one option_one, ist.status_name status_code,ist.status_id,ist.action_taken action_taken,ist.total_time total_time,st.case_en status_en_name, st.case_ar status_ar_name ,ist.end_date, cm.created_by client_complaint_created_by, cm.SERV_LEVEL_AGR urgency ,cu.phone as client_phone, cu.mobile as client_mobile, cu.option3 as client_other from issue i,client_complaints cm,client cu,users u,distribution_list dl, project p,ticket_type tp, users s, issue_status ist, status_type st where i.id=cm.issue_id and i.urgency_id=cu.sys_id and dl.receip_id=u.user_id and dl.sender_id=s.user_id and p.option_one = dl.receip_id and cm.id=dl.client_com_id and ist.business_obj_id=dl.client_com_id and st.id = ist.status_name and ist.end_date is null and cm.ticket_type=tp.type_id
union all
select i.id issue_id,i.issue_title,i.project_name,i.business_id,i.business_id_by_date ,cm.business_comp_id,cm.id as comp_id,cm.ticket_type,cm.current_owner,cm.current_owner_id,cm.current_owner_since,tp.type_name ,cu.sys_id as customer_id,cu.name as customer_name,cu.mobile as mobile,cu.age_group as age,u.user_id,u.user_name,u.full_name ,s.user_id as sender_id,s.full_name as sender_name ,IST.BEGIN_DATE as entry_date,dl.acknowledge_date,dl.option1 comp_subject,dl.resp_context as resp,dl.receip_id ,dl.is_acknowledged,dl.any_comment as comments,dl.client_com_id,dl.option3, p.project_id department_id,p.project_name department_name,p.option_one option_one, ist.status_name status_code,ist.status_id,ist.action_taken action_taken,ist.total_time total_time,st.case_en status_en_name, st.case_ar status_ar_name ,ist.end_date, cm.created_by client_complaint_created_by, cm.SERV_LEVEL_AGR urgency,cu.phone as client_phone, cu.mobile as client_mobile, cu.option3 as client_other from issue i,client_complaints cm,client cu,users u,distribution_list dl, project p,ticket_type tp, users s, issue_status ist, status_type st where i.id=cm.issue_id and i.urgency_id=cu.sys_id and dl.receip_id=u.user_id and dl.sender_id=s.user_id and p.option_one = dl.receip_id and cm.id=dl.client_com_id and ist.business_obj_id=dl.client_com_id and st.id = ist.status_name and cm.ticket_type=tp.type_id and ist.end_date is not null and ist.total_time=0

CREATE OR REPLACE FORCE VIEW ISSUE_BY_COMPLAINT AS select i.id issue_id,i.issue_title,i.call_type,i.project_name,i.business_id,i.business_id_by_date, i.USER_ID created_by ,cm.business_comp_id,cm.id as comp_id,cm.ticket_type,cm.current_owner,cm.current_owner_id,cm.current_owner_since,tp.type_name ,cu.sys_id as customer_id,cu.name as customer_name,cu.age_group as age,u.user_id,u.user_name,u.full_name ,s.user_id as sender_id,s.full_name as sender_name ,IST.BEGIN_DATE as entry_date,dl.acknowledge_date,dl.option1 comp_subject,dl.resp_context as resp,dl.receip_id ,dl.is_acknowledged,dl.any_comment as comments,dl.client_com_id,dl.option3, p.project_id department_id,p.project_name department_name,p.option_one option_one, ist.status_name status_code,ist.action_taken action_taken,st.case_en status_en_name, st.case_ar status_ar_name ,cu.phone as client_phone, cu.mobile as client_mobile , cu.option3 as client_other, I.CURRENT_STATUS_SINCE, cu.inter_phone, CCT.TYPE_TAG from issue i,client_complaints cm,client cu,users u,distribution_list dl, project p,ticket_type tp, users s, issue_status ist, status_type st, CLIENT_COMPLAINTS_TYPE CCT where i.id=cm.issue_id and cm.id = CCT.id and i.urgency_id=cu.sys_id and dl.receip_id=u.user_id and dl.sender_id=s.user_id and p.option_one = dl.receip_id and cm.id=dl.client_com_id and ist.business_obj_id=dl.client_com_id and st.id = ist.status_name and ist.end_date is null and cm.ticket_type=tp.type_id and dl.RESP_CONTEXT = '1'

CREATE OR REPLACE FORCE VIEW "ISSUE_BY_COMPLAINT2" ("ISSUE_ID", "ISSUE_TITLE", "PROJECT_NAME", "BUSINESS_ID", "BUSINESS_ID_BY_DATE", "BUSINESS_COMP_ID", "COMP_ID", "TICKET_TYPE", "CURRENT_OWNER", "CURRENT_OWNER_ID", "CURRENT_OWNER_SINCE", "TYPE_NAME", "CUSTOMER_ID", "CUSTOMER_NAME", "AGE", "USER_ID", "USER_NAME", "FULL_NAME", "SENDER_ID", "SENDER_NAME", "ENTRY_DATE", "ACKNOWLEDGE_DATE", "COMP_SUBJECT", "RESP", "RECEIP_ID", "IS_ACKNOWLEDGED", "COMMENTS", "CLIENT_COM_ID", "OPTION3", "DEPARTMENT_ID", "DEPARTMENT_NAME", "OPTION_ONE", "STATUS_CODE", "ACTION_TAKEN", "TOTAL_TIME", "STATUS_EN_NAME", "STATUS_AR_NAME", "CLIENT_PHONE" ,"CLIENT_MOBILE" , "CLIENT_OTHER") AS select i.id issue_id,i.issue_title,i.project_name,i.business_id,i.business_id_by_date ,cm.business_comp_id,cm.id as comp_id,cm.ticket_type,cm.current_owner,cm.current_owner_id,cm.current_owner_since,tp.type_name ,cu.sys_id as customer_id,cu.name as customer_name,cu.age_group as age,u.user_id,u.user_name,u.full_name ,s.user_id as sender_id,s.full_name as sender_name ,IST.BEGIN_DATE as entry_date,dl.acknowledge_date,dl.option1 comp_subject,dl.resp_context as resp,dl.receip_id ,dl.is_acknowledged,dl.any_comment as comments,dl.client_com_id,dl.option3, p.project_id department_id,p.project_name department_name,p.option_one option_one, ist.status_name status_code,ist.action_taken action_taken,ist.total_time total_time,st.case_en status_en_name, st.case_ar status_ar_name,cu.phone as client_phone, cu.mobile as client_mobile , cu.option3 as client_other from issue i,client_complaints cm,client cu,users u,distribution_list dl, project p,ticket_type tp, users s, issue_status ist, status_type st where i.id=cm.issue_id and i.urgency_id=cu.sys_id and dl.receip_id=u.user_id and dl.sender_id=s.user_id and p.option_one = dl.receip_id and cm.id=dl.client_com_id and ist.business_obj_id=dl.client_com_id and st.id = ist.status_name and cm.ticket_type=tp.type_id and ist.end_date is null

create or replace view employee_view as select unique i.id issue_id,i.issue_title,i.project_name,i.business_id,i.business_id_by_date ,cm.business_comp_id,cm.id as comp_id,cm.ticket_type,cm.current_owner,cm.current_owner_id,cm.current_owner_since,tp.type_name ,cu.sys_id as customer_id,cu.name as customer_name,cu.age_group as age,u.user_id,u.user_name,u.full_name ,dl.sender_id ,s.full_name as sender_name ,IST.BEGIN_DATE as entry_date,dl.acknowledge_date,dl.option1 comp_subject,dl.option2 as manager_comment ,dl.is_acknowledged,dl.any_comment as comments,dl.client_com_id,dl.receip_id, dl.resp_context as resp,dl.sys_id, ist.status_name status_code, st.case_en status_en_name, st.case_ar status_ar_name, ur.FULL_NAME display_created_by,cu.phone as client_phone, cu.mobile as client_mobile , cu.option3 as client_other from client_complaints cm left join issue i on cm.issue_id = i.id left join issue_status ist on cm.id = ist.business_obj_id and ist.end_date is null left join client cu on i.urgency_id = cu.sys_id left join (select client_com_id, max(sys_id) sys_id from distribution_list group by client_com_id) dl1 on dl1.client_com_id = cm.id left join distribution_list dl on dl1.sys_id = dl.sys_id left join users u on dl.receip_id = u.user_id left join ticket_type tp on cm.ticket_type = tp.type_id left join users s on dl.sender_id = s.user_id left join status_type st on st.id = ist.status_name left join users ur on i.user_id = ur.user_id

create or replace view employee_view2 as select unique i.id issue_id,i.issue_title,i.project_name,i.business_id,i.business_id_by_date ,cm.business_comp_id,cm.id as comp_id,cm.ticket_type,cm.current_owner,cm.current_owner_id,cm.current_owner_since,tp.type_name ,cu.sys_id as customer_id,cu.name as customer_name,cu.age_group as age,u.user_id,u.user_name,u.full_name ,dl.sender_id ,s.full_name as sender_name ,IST.BEGIN_DATE as entry_date,dl.acknowledge_date,dl.option1 comp_subject,dl.option2 as manager_comment ,dl.is_acknowledged,dl.any_comment as comments,dl.client_com_id,dl.receip_id, dl.resp_context as resp,dl.sys_id, --p.project_id department_id,p.project_name department_name, ist.status_name status_code, st.case_en status_en_name, st.case_ar status_ar_name, cu.phone as client_phone, cu.mobile as client_mobile , cu.option3 as client_other, cu.created_by client_created_by from client_complaints cm left join issue i on i.id=cm.issue_id left join issue_status ist on cm.id = ist.business_obj_id and ist.end_date is null left join client cu on i.urgency_id = cu.sys_id left join (select client_com_id, max(sys_id) sys_id from distribution_list group by client_com_id) dl1 on dl1.client_com_id = cm.id left join distribution_list dl on dl1.sys_id = dl.sys_id left join users u on dl.receip_id = u.user_id left join ticket_type tp on cm.ticket_type = tp.type_id left join users s on dl.sender_id = s.user_id left join status_type st on st.id = ist.status_name

create or replace view responsibilty_comp_emp_view as select i.id issue_id,i.issue_title,i.project_name,i.business_id,i.business_id_by_date ,cm.business_comp_id,cm.id as comp_id,cm.current_owner,cm.current_owner_id,cm.current_owner_since,cm.ticket_type ,cu.sys_id as customer_id,cu.name as customer_name,cu.age_group as age,u.user_id,u.user_name,u.full_name ,s.user_id as sender_id,s.full_name as sender_name ,dl.receive_date as entry_date,dl.acknowledge_date,dl.option1 comp_subject,dl.option2 as manager_comment,dl.option3 ,dl.is_acknowledged,dl.any_comment as comments,dl.client_com_id,dl.receip_id, dl.resp_context as resp,cu.phone as client_phone, cu.mobile as client_mobile , cu.option3 as client_other from issue i,client_complaints cm,client cu,users u,distribution_list dl,users s where i.id=cm.issue_id and i.urgency_id=cu.sys_id and dl.receip_id=u.user_id and dl.sender_id=s.user_id and cm.id=dl.client_com_id

create or replace view client_view as select c.sys_id client_id,c.client_no client_no,c.name client_name,c.gender gender, c.address address, c.phone phone, c.mobile mobile, c.email email, c.clientssn clientSsn, c.partner partner, c.job job, c.option1 option1, c.option2 option2, c.matiral_status matiralStatus, c.age_group age, cp.id client_project_id, cp.project_id project_id, cp.product_id product_id, cp.product_category_id product_category_id, cp.budget budget, cp.period period, cp.payment_system payment_system, cp.note cp_note, cp.product_name product_name, cp.product_category_name product_category_name, cs.id client_season_id, cs.season_id season_id, cs.notes season_notes, cs.season_name season_name, c.option3 as client_other from client c,client_projects cp,client_seasons cs where c.sys_id(+)=cp.client_id and c.sys_id=cs.client_id and cp.client_id=cs.client_id

create or replace view unit_status_view as select ist."STATUS_ID",ist."STATUS_NAME",ist."ISSUE_TITLE",ist."STATUS_NOTE", ist."END_DATE",ist."BEGIN_DATE",ist."TOTAL_TIME",ist."CAUSE_DESCRIPTION",ist."ACTION_TAKEN", ist."PREVENTION_TAKEN",ist."BUSINESS_OBJ_ID",ist."OBJECT_TYPE",ist."PARENT_ID",ist."CREATED_BY", p.project_id,p.project_name,p.eq_no,p.main_proj_id,p.location_type,p.creation_time,p.option_one,p.option_two, p.option_three,p.futile,p.coordinate,p.project_description from issue_status ist, PROJECT P where ist.business_obj_id=p.project_id and ist.end_date is null

create or replace view wf_task_comments as select wf.ID, wf.business_obj_id, wf.object_type, wf.DESCR,wf.CREATION_DATE, u.USER_NAME from WF_TASK_VISIT wf INNER JOIN USERS u ON wf.CREATED_BY = u.USER_ID

create or replace view clients_units_view as select u.form_no, m.client_code, c.client_name, u.stage_code, stage_description, u.section_code, section_description, u.building_type, building_type_description, u.sample_code, u.building_code, building_description, u.unit_code from UNITS_SCHEMA.reservation_form_m m, UNITS_SCHEMA.reserve_form_units u, UNITS_SCHEMA.clients_m c, UNITS_SCHEMA.stage_c st, UNITS_SCHEMA.sections_c sc, UNITS_SCHEMA.building_types_c bb, UNITS_SCHEMA.building_c bc where m.reserve_form_no = u.form_no and m.client_code = c.client_code and u.stage_code = st.stage_code and u.stage_code = sc.stage_code and u.section_code = sc.section_code and u.building_type = bb.building_type_code and u.stage_code = bc.stage_code and u.section_code = bc.section_code and u.sample_code = bc.sample_code and u.building_code = bc.building_code and u.building_type = bc.building_type_code

CREATE OR REPLACE view complaints_issue_view AS SELECT i."DOCUMENT_ID",i."DOCUMENT_TITLE",i."BUSINESS_OBJ_ID",i."OBJECT_TYPE",i."DESCRIPTION",i."DOCUMENT_DATE",i."CREATED_BY",i."CREATED_BY_NAME",i."DOCUMENT_META_TYPE",i."DOCUMENT_TYPE",i."CONFIG_ITEM_TYPE",i."CREATION_TIME",i."OPTION1",i."OPTION2",i."OPTION3", c.business_comp_id, c.issue_id, s.business_id, s.business_id_by_date, t.TYPE_NAME FROM issue_document i LEFT JOIN client_complaints c ON i.business_obj_id = c.id LEFT JOIN issue s ON c.issue_id = s.id LEFT JOIN DOC_TYPE t ON i.CONFIG_ITEM_TYPE = t.TYPE_ID

CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW NOTIFICATIONS AS SELECT I.ID ISSUE_ID, I.USER_ID ISSUE_CREATED_BY, CM.ID CLIENT_COMPLAINT_ID, CM.CURRENT_OWNER_ID COMPLAINT_CURRENT_OWNER_ID, CM.CURRENT_OWNER COMPLAINT_CURRENT_OWNER, CM.CREATED_BY COMPLAINT_CREATED_BY, TT.TYPE_NAME COMPLAINT_TYPE_NAME, U.FULL_NAME COMPLAINT_CREATED_BY_NAME, CM.CURRENT_STATUS, CM.BUSINESS_COMP_ID, A.ALERT_TYPE_ID, A.CREATED_BY ALERT_CREATED_BY, EMPLOYEE.FULL_NAME ALERT_CREATED_BY_NAME, A.CRAETION_DATE ALERT_CRAETION_TIME, AT.NAME ALERT_TYPE_NAME, I.BUSINESS_ID_BY_DATE, CM.BUSINESS_ID, A.OPTION1 STATUS_CODE, A.ID ALERT_ID, CL.NAME CLIENT_NAME FROM ISSUE I, CLIENT_COMPLAINTS CM, ALERT A, ALERT_TYPE AT, TICKET_TYPE TT, USERS U, USERS EMPLOYEE, CLIENT CL WHERE I.ID = CM.ISSUE_ID AND CM.ID = A.BUSINESS_OBJ_ID AND A.ALERT_TYPE_ID = AT.ID AND CM.TICKET_TYPE = TT.TYPE_ID AND U.USER_ID = CM.CREATED_BY AND EMPLOYEE.USER_ID = A.CREATED_BY AND I.URGENCY_ID = CL.SYS_ID

CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW EMPLOYEES_LOADS AS SELECT CM.CURRENT_OWNER, CM.CURRENT_OWNER_ID, U.FULL_NAME CURRENT_OWNER_FULL_NAME, CM.CURRENT_STATUS STATUS_CODE, ST.CASE_AR STATUS_NAME, P.PROJECT_ID DEPARTMENT_ID, P.PROJECT_NAME DEPARTMENT_NAME, P.EQ_NO DEPARTMENT_CODE, COUNT(*) NO_TICKET FROM CLIENT_COMPLAINTS CM JOIN STATUS_TYPE ST ON CM.CURRENT_STATUS = ST.ID JOIN USERS U ON U.USER_ID = CM.CURRENT_OWNER_ID JOIN PROJECT P ON P.PROJECT_ID = GET_DEPARTMENT_BY_COMPLAINT_ID(CM.ID) GROUP BY CM.CURRENT_OWNER, CM.CURRENT_OWNER_ID,CM.CURRENT_STATUS,ST.CASE_AR, P.PROJECT_ID, P.PROJECT_NAME, P.EQ_NO, U.FULL_NAME ORDER BY CM.CURRENT_OWNER, NO_TICKET DESC

CREATE OR REPLACE FORCE VIEW APPOINTMENT_NOTIFICATION AS SELECT A.ID, A.USER_ID, U1.FULL_NAME AS USER_NAME, A.CLIENT_ID, C.NAME AS CLIENT_NAME, C.MOBILE AS MOBILE, C.INTER_PHONE AS PHONE, A.TITLE, A.NOTE, A.OPTION1, A.OPTION2, A.OPTION3, CAST(A.APPOINTMENT_DATE AS TIMESTAMP) AS APPOINTMENT_DATE, ROUND(CAST((24 * 60 * (A.APPOINTMENT_DATE - SYSDATE)) AS NUMBER), 0) AS TIME_REMAINING_MINUTES, A.CREATION_TIME, A.APPOINTMENT_PLACE, A.APPOINTMENT_FOR, U2.FULL_NAME AS APPOINTMENT_FOR_NAME, A.ISSUE_ID, A.CLIENT_COMPLAINT_ID, A.CURRENT_STATUS AS CURRENT_STATUS_CODE, S.CASE_AR AS CURRENT_STATUS, A.CURRENT_STATUS_SINCE , A."COMMENT", A.OPTION4 AS DIRECTED_BY, U3.FULL_NAME AS DIRECTED_BY_NAME, A.OPTION5, A.OPTION6, A.CALL_DURATION, A.OPTION7, A.OPTION8, A.OPTION9 FROM APPOINTMENT A INNER JOIN CLIENT C ON A.CLIENT_ID = C.SYS_ID INNER JOIN STATUS_TYPE S ON S.ID = A.CURRENT_STATUS INNER JOIN USERS U1 ON U1.USER_ID = A.USER_ID INNER JOIN USERS U2 ON U2.USER_ID = A.APPOINTMENT_FOR LEFT JOIN USERS U3 ON U3.USER_ID = A.OPTION4

CREATE OR REPLACE FORCE VIEW EMPLOYEES_LOADS_GROUP_SUMMARY AS SELECT U.USER_ID, U.USER_NAME, U.FULL_NAME, UG.GROUP_ID, UG.GROUP_NAME, UG.IS_DEFAULT, NVL(LOADS.TOTAL, 0) AS TOTAL FROM USERS U LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT CURRENT_OWNER_ID, CURRENT_OWNER_FULL_NAME, SUM(NO_TICKET) AS TOTAL FROM EMPLOYEES_LOADS WHERE (STATUS_CODE != 6 and STATUS_CODE != 7) GROUP BY CURRENT_OWNER_ID, CURRENT_OWNER_FULL_NAME ) LOADS ON U.USER_ID = LOADS.CURRENT_OWNER_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN USER_GROUP UG ON U.USER_ID = UG.USER_ID

CREATE OR REPLACE FORCE VIEW RESERVATION_NOTIFICATION AS SELECT R.ID, R.PROJECT_ID AS UNIT_ID, R.CREATED_BY, U1.FULL_NAME AS USER_NAME, R.CLIENT_ID, C.NAME AS CLIENT_NAME, R.CREATION_TIME, R.PERIOD, R.CURRENT_STATUS, ROUND(CAST((24 * 60 * 60 * (CAST(R.CREATION_TIME AS DATE) - SYSDATE)) AS NUMBER) + (TO_NUMBER(R.PERIOD) * 60 * 60), 0) AS TIME_REMAINING_SECONDS FROM RESERVATION R INNER JOIN CLIENT C ON R.CLIENT_ID = C.SYS_ID INNER JOIN USERS U1 ON U1.USER_ID = R.CREATED_BY WHERE REGEXP_LIKE(R.PERIOD, '^-?[0-9]+(\.[0-9]+)?$')

CREATE OR REPLACE FORCE VIEW REQUEST_ITEMS_DETAILS AS SELECT RI.ID, RI.ISSUE_ID, RI.PROJECT_ID, RI.QUANTITY, RI.VALID, RI.NOTE, RI.CREATED_BY, RI.CREATION_TIME, RI.OPTION1, RI.OPTION2, RI.OPTION3, RI.OPTION4, RI.OPTION5, RI.OPTION6, I.BUSINESS_ID AS ISSUE_CODE, P.EQ_NO AS ITEM_CODE, P.PROJECT_NAME AS ITEM_NAME FROM REQUEST_ITEMS RI INNER JOIN PROJECT P ON RI.PROJECT_ID = P.PROJECT_ID INNER JOIN ISSUE I ON RI.ISSUE_ID = I.ID

CREATE OR REPLACE FORCE VIEW ISSUE_BY_COMPLAINT_UNIQUE AS SELECT I.ID ISSUE_ID,I.ISSUE_TITLE,I.CALL_TYPE,I.PROJECT_NAME,I.BUSINESS_ID,I.BUSINESS_ID_BY_DATE ,I.USER_ID CREATED_BY, CS.FULL_NAME CREATED_BY_NAME ,CM.BUSINESS_COMP_ID,CM.ID AS COMP_ID,CM.TICKET_TYPE,CM.CURRENT_OWNER,CM.CURRENT_OWNER_ID,CM.CURRENT_OWNER_SINCE ,CU.SYS_ID AS CUSTOMER_ID,CU.CLIENT_NO AS CUSTOMER_NO, CU.NAME AS CUSTOMER_NAME,CU.AGE_GROUP AS AGE ,CU.PHONE AS CLIENT_PHONE, CU.MOBILE AS CLIENT_MOBILE , CU.OPTION3 AS CLIENT_OTHER, CU.INTER_PHONE ,IST.STATUS_NAME STATUS_CODE,IST.ACTION_TAKEN ACTION_TAKEN ,ST.CASE_EN STATUS_EN_NAME, ST.CASE_AR STATUS_AR_NAME ,IST.BEGIN_DATE AS ENTRY_DATE,DL.ACKNOWLEDGE_DATE,DL.OPTION1 COMP_SUBJECT,DL.RECEIP_ID ,DL.IS_ACKNOWLEDGED,DL.ANY_COMMENT AS COMMENTS,DL.CLIENT_COM_ID,DL.OPTION3 ,U.USER_NAME RECIPIENT_NAME,U.FULL_NAME RECIPIENT_FULL_NAME ,P.PROJECT_ID DEPARTMENT_ID,P.PROJECT_NAME DEPARTMENT_NAME ,CMN.FULL_NAME MANAGER_NAME, TP.TYPE_NAME ,CM.CREATED_BY SENDER_ID,S.USER_NAME AS SENDER_NAME, S.FULL_NAME AS SENDER_FULL_NAME, CCT.TYPE_TAG FROM ISSUE I RIGHT JOIN CLIENT_COMPLAINTS CM ON I.ID = CM.ISSUE_ID LEFT JOIN CLIENT_COMPLAINTS_TYPE CCT ON CM.ID = CCT.ID LEFT JOIN CLIENT CU ON I.URGENCY_ID = CU.SYS_ID LEFT JOIN TICKET_TYPE TP ON CM.TICKET_TYPE = TP.TYPE_ID LEFT JOIN ISSUE_STATUS IST ON CM.ID = IST.BUSINESS_OBJ_ID AND IST.END_DATE IS NULL LEFT JOIN STATUS_TYPE ST ON IST.STATUS_NAME = ST.ID LEFT JOIN (SELECT D1.* FROM DISTRIBUTION_LIST D1 RIGHT JOIN (SELECT MAX(SYS_ID) SYS_ID, CLIENT_COM_ID FROM DISTRIBUTION_LIST WHERE RESP_CONTEXT = '1' GROUP BY CLIENT_COM_ID) D2 ON D1.SYS_ID = D2.SYS_ID) DL ON CM.ID = DL.CLIENT_COM_ID LEFT JOIN USERS U ON DL.RECEIP_ID = U.USER_ID LEFT JOIN PROJECT P ON DL.RECEIP_ID = P.OPTION_ONE LEFT JOIN USERS S ON CM.CREATED_BY = S.USER_ID LEFT JOIN USERS CS ON I.USER_ID = CS.USER_ID LEFT JOIN USERS CMN ON P.OPTION_ONE = CMN.USER_ID

CREATE OR REPLACE FORCE VIEW CLIENT_COMPLAINTS_TIME_LINE AS SELECT C.ID, C.ISSUE_ID, I.BUSINESS_ID, I.BUSINESS_ID_BY_DATE, I.USER_ID AS SOURCE_ID, U.FULL_NAME AS SOURCE_NAME, C.BUSINESS_COMP_ID, C.CURRENT_OWNER, SUBSTR(C.BUSINESS_COMP_ID, 0, INSTR(C.BUSINESS_COMP_ID, '-') - 1) AS DEPARTMENT_CODE, C.CREATED_BY, C.CREATION_TIME, C.TICKET_TYPE, TT.TYPE_NAME AS TICKET_TYPE_NAME, ROUND(CAST((24 * 60 * 60 * (SYSDATE - CAST(C.CREATION_TIME AS DATE))) AS NUMBER)) AS TOTAL_TIME_SECONDS, STATUS.STATUS_NAME AS STATUS_CODE, ROUND(CAST((24 * 60 * 60 * (SYSDATE - CAST(STATUS.BEGIN_DATE AS DATE))) AS NUMBER)) AS LAST_TIME_UPDATED_SECONDS FROM CLIENT_COMPLAINTS C INNER JOIN ISSUE I ON C.ISSUE_ID = I.ID INNER JOIN USERS U ON I.USER_ID = U.USER_ID INNER JOIN ISSUE_STATUS STATUS ON C.ID = STATUS.BUSINESS_OBJ_ID AND STATUS.END_DATE IS NULL AND STATUS.STATUS_NAME = '6' INNER JOIN TICKET_TYPE TT ON TT.TYPE_ID = C.TICKET_TYPE

CREATE OR REPLACE FORCE VIEW SLA_NOTIFICATION AS SELECT SL.*, I.BUSINESS_ID, I.BUSINESS_ID_BY_DATE, CC.BUSINESS_COMP_ID, CC.ISSUE_ID, U.FULL_NAME, CC.CURRENT_STATUS, ST.CASE_AR STATUS_NAME, TRUNC(SL.CREATION_TIME) + SL.EXECUTION_PERIOD END_DATE, I.URGENCY_ID CLIENT_ID, C.NAME CLIENT_NAME , ROUND(CAST((24 * 60 * ((SL.CREATION_TIME + SL.EXECUTION_PERIOD) - SYSDATE)) AS NUMBER), 0) AS TIME_REMAINING_MINUTES FROM CLIENT_COMPLAINTS_SLA SL JOIN CLIENT_COMPLAINTS CC ON SL.ID = CC.ID AND CC.CURRENT_STATUS != '7' LEFT JOIN ISSUE I ON CC.ISSUE_ID = I.ID LEFT JOIN USERS U ON CC.CURRENT_OWNER_ID = U.USER_ID LEFT JOIN STATUS_TYPE ST ON CC.CURRENT_STATUS = ST.ID LEFT JOIN CLIENT C ON I.URGENCY_ID = C.SYS_ID

CREATE OR REPLACE FORCE VIEW GMAIL_CLIENT_EMAILS ("CLIENT_NO", "NAME", "EMAIL", "THREAD_ID", "MESSAGE_ID", "LABEL_IDS", "TO_EMAILS", "FROM_EMAIL", "CC_EMAILS", "BCC_EMAILS", "DATE_EMAIL", "SUBJECT", "PLAINTEXT", "ATTACHMENTS", "TO_IP", "FROM_IP", "IS_SENT_REC_DRAFT", "SNIPPET") AS SELECT CLIENT_NO, NAME, EMAIL ,THREAD_ID, MESSAGE_ID, LABEL_IDS, TO_EMAILS ,FROM_EMAIL, CC_EMAILS , BCC_EMAILS , DATE_EMAIL , SUBJECT , PLAINTEXT , ATTACHMENTS , TO_IP , FROM_IP , IS_SENT_REC_DRAFT , SNIPPET FROM CLIENT join CLIENT_EMAILS on CLIENT.EMAIL=CLIENT_EMAILS.CLIENT_EMAIL

CREATE OR REPLACE FORCE VIEW CLIENT_CAMPAIGN_VIEW AS SELECT CL.*, CP.CAMPAIGN_TITLE, CM.CREATION_TIME CAMPAIGN_TIME,U.user_ID OWNER_ID, U.FULL_NAME OWNER_NAME, CC.BUSINESS_COMP_ID, 24*(to_date(to_char(CM.CREATION_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD hh24:mi'), 'YYYY-MM-DD hh24:mi') - to_date(to_char(CL.CREATION_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD hh24:mi'), 'YYYY-MM-DD hh24:mi')) As Time_Diff, (SYSDATE - CC.CREATION_TIME) REQUEST_AGE FROM CLIENT CL LEFT JOIN CLIENT_CAMPAIGN CM ON CL.SYS_ID = CM.CLIENT_ID LEFT JOIN CAMPAIGN CP ON CM.CAMPAIGN_ID = CP.ID LEFT JOIN ISSUE I ON I.URGENCY_ID = CL.SYS_ID RIGHT JOIN CLIENT_COMPLAINTS CC ON I.ID = CC.ISSUE_ID LEFT JOIN USERS U ON CC.CURRENT_OWNER_ID = U.USER_ID
